name: Vidalia Onion Chicken Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli according to directions. Drain and set aside.
2. Saute onions and mushrooms in 2 tbsp oil until limp. Drain and combine with broccoli.
3. Combine cheese, eggs, mayonnaise, water, and rice. Set aside.
4. Brown chicken breasts in 3 tbsp oil.
5. Assemble: Pour the broccoli mixture over the cheese mixture in a greased, shallow baking pan. Place chicken breasts on top and sprinkle with paprika. Bake uncovered at 350°F for 45 minutes.
NOTE - You may reduce fat and cholesterol by using light skim milk cheese, egg substitute, light mayonnaise, and non-fat cooking spray as alternatives.
